scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:cli
scripts.build:web: bun run --cwd ../../packages/ui build && bun build ./web/main.tsx --outfile ./public/assets/app.js --target browser --format esm && ../../node_modules/.bin/tailwindcss -i ./web/app.css -o ./public/assets/styles.css --minify && cp node_modules/katex/dist/katex.min.css ./public/assets/katex.min.css && mkdir -p ./public/assets/fonts && cp node_modules/katex/dist/fonts/* ./public/assets/fonts/
scripts.dev: bun run build:web && bun run --hot src/server.ts
